_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 16:14 UTC tick — level_cross OIL 90 fired (tick tag 90.003, day high 89.985, immediate rejection back to 89.983 bid, classic liquidity sweep). News narrative bearish oil on US-Iran talks proceeding (CNBC/Reuters: 'oil falls on expectations talks proceed'), contradicts momentum-buy flip condition. SKIP entry (wick-only sweep + bearish news + binary T-~8h to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22). 3 level_alerts MODIFY (refreshed all price_refs + oil thesis sharpened to 'sell fade on retest w/ rejection, flip to buy only on SUSTAINED close >90.5 with ceasefire-fail confirmation'), 9 structure_watch KEEP, 8 queries KEEP. Broker $1000/0 pos matches state.

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD near 0.707 support on ceasefire-fail spike — last 0.71609 bid (~91p above), binary T-~7.75h to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22. Wait for rejection candle on 0.707 touch; skip naked level hits.

level_alerts.note: sell OIL 90 fade — 90.003 tagged this tick (level_cross fired), IMMEDIATELY rejected back to 89.983 bid (day high 89.985, wick-only sweep). News narrative bearish (CNBC/Reuters 21 Apr: 'oil falls on expectations US-Iran talks proceed → more supply'), contradicts momentum-buy flip. Sell the fade on retest WITH rejection wick is the cleaner entry. FLIP to momentum buy ONLY if SUSTAINED close >90.5 on confirmed ceasefire-fail headline. Binary T-~7.75h. level_alerts.proximity: AT-ZONE — 90.003 tick tag rejected (day high 89.985), now 89.983 bid, +4.78% day range 85.622-89.985. Not trading this wick (need sustained break + news confirmation). Second test of 90 with rejection wick = sell entry; sustained close >90.5 w/ ceasefire-fail = flip to buy.
